ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Qualify and Discover Needs for PE service line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Qualify and Discover Needs") && (ISPICKVAL(Product_Line__c,"") || ISPICKVAL(Service__c,"") || ISPICKVAL(Type,""))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Product Line, Service and Type.
